_comment2: BUCKET 1 — ICICI Prudential's OWN forms (fixed format, full schema)
_comment6: 3. Medico-legal / Medical Cause of Death Certificate

MedicalAttendantHospitalCertificate._format: ICICI Pru Format AI — fixed form, full schema
MedicalAttendantHospitalCertificate._note: Both pages of the form are captured here

PreviousTreatmentHistory._comment: Array — one entry per prior hospitalization episode

EmployerCertificate._format: ICICI Pru Format AJ — fixed form, full schema

SickLeaveHistory._comment: Array — one entry per sick leave period in last 5 years

MedicalBenefitsClaimed._comment: Array — one entry per medical benefit availed

GroupInsurancePolicies._comment: Array — insurance policies with premium deducted from salary

MedicoLegalCauseOfDeathCertificate._note: Also called Form 4 / Form 4A under RBD Act. Format varies by state but core fields are consistent.

ImmediateCause._note: Part I(a) — disease/condition directly causing death

AntecedentCause._note: Part I(b) — disease that caused immediate cause

ContributoryConditions._note: Part II — other conditions not directly causing death

DischargeSummary._format: Semi-structured — hospital issued, format varies, target extraction

Comorbidities._note: Pre-existing conditions mentioned — critical for claim

AdmissionForm._format: Semi-structured — hospital issued, format varies, target extraction

IndoorCasePapers._format: Semi-structured — hospital inpatient record, multi-page, target extraction
IndoorCasePapers._note: ICPs are the most information-rich document. Extract all pre-existing conditions carefully — critical for claim verification.

Comorbidities._note: CRITICAL — any pre-existing conditions mentioned anywhere in ICPs

PastMedicalHistoryMentioned._note: Any history of prior illness mentioned by treating team

DiagnosticTestReport._format: Variable — lab/USG/pathology reports vary by centre, facts-only extraction
DiagnosticTestReport._note: Do not attempt to extract every test value. Extract only metadata and findings relevant to cause of death.

AbnormalFindings._note: ONLY extract abnormal or flagged values — not all test results

PastMedicalRecordsAndTreatmentPapers._format: Fully variable — prescriptions, OPD slips, old reports, facts-only
PastMedicalRecordsAndTreatmentPapers._note: These are catch-all documents. Do not enforce structure. Extract only identity confirmation and any pre-existing conditions. Everything else goes to UnmappedFields.

DiagnosisOrConditionMentioned._note: CRITICAL — any diagnosis or condition. Pre-existing disease history is key for claim.

MedicationsMentioned._note: Medication names can reveal undisclosed conditions

RelationToCurrentClaim._note: Model assessment: is this record related to cause of death?
